title: Safe Structured Prompt
description: A well-structured system prompt with explicit role boundaries, output format constraints, and scope limiters. Represents best practices for production LLM deployments.
structure_summary: system role declaration + explicit output format instruction + output constraints (max, limit) + section delimiters + refusal boundary
explanation: This prompt achieves a Safe score because it includes explicit output format instructions, uses section delimiters to isolate system context from user input, and constrains output length. Ambiguity density is low — qualitative modifiers are absent. The primary residual risk is moderate context saturation from a dense system prompt.
mitigations: Reduce system prompt length if context window utilization exceeds 30%
Add explicit refusal instruction to handle out-of-scope user requests
